name: SunPower Corporation
description: SunPower Corporation is a leading American provider of residential solar energy and battery storage solutions. The company specializes in high-efficiency photovoltaic solar panels, integrated energy management systems, and custom solar installations designed to increase energy independence for homeowners. With a focus on innovation and durability, SunPower offers comprehensive solar ecosystems that include advanced battery storage, grid-tied equipment, and industry-leading warranties. By providing seamless end-to-end service from consultation to installation, the company empowers customers to reduce their carbon footprint and lower electricity costs through reliable, sustainable, and smart renewable energy technology.
